name: cortex-query-traps-logs

outputs.description: Severity level associated with the event. Cortex.Logging.Traps.AgentID Unique identifier for the Traps agent.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.Severity

outputs.description: Operating system of the endpoint. Cortex.Logging.Traps.EndPointHeader.IsVdi Indicates whether the endpoint is a virtual desktop infrastructure (VDI).
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.EndPointHeader.OsType

outputs.description: Full version number of the operating system running on the endpoint. For example, 6.1.7601.19135. Cortex.Logging.Traps.EndPointHeader.Is64 Indicates whether the endpoint is running a 64-bit version of Windows.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.EndPointHeader.OSVersion

outputs.description: IP address of the endpoint. Cortex.Logging.Traps.EndPointHeader.DeviceName Hostname of the endpoint on which the event was logged.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.EndPointHeader.AgentIP

outputs.description: Domain to which the endpoint belongs. Cortex.Logging.Traps.EndPointHeader.Username The username on which the event was logged.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.EndPointHeader.DeviceDomain

outputs.description: Universal Time Coordinated (UTC) equivalent of the time at which an agent logged an event. ISO-8601 string representation. Cortex.Logging.Traps.EndPointHeader.AgentVersion Version of the Traps agent.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.EndPointHeader.AgentTime

outputs.description: The Traps agent status. Cortex.Logging.Traps.RecordType Record type associated with the event.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.EndPointHeader.ProtectionStatus

outputs.description: Tenant external ID. Cortex.Logging.Traps.EventType Subtype of the event.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.TrapsID

outputs.description: Unique identifier for the event in Cortex. Cortex.Logging.Traps.ServerHost Hostname of the Traps management service.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.UUID

outputs.description: Universal Time Coordinated (UTC) equivalent of the time at which an event was logged. Cortex.Logging.Traps.ServerComponentVersion Software version of the Traps management service.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.GeneratedTime

outputs.description: Region ID. Cortex.Logging.Traps.CustomerID Customer ID.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.RegionID

outputs.description: Universal Time Coordinated (UTC) equivalent of the time at which the server generated the log. If the log was generated on an endpoint. Cortex.Logging.Traps.OriginalAgentTime Original time on the endpoint device.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.ServerTime

outputs.description: Sting The Traps system component that initiated the event For example:, TrapsAgent, TrapsServiceCore, TrapsServiceManagement, TrapsServiceBackend. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.PreventionKey
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.Facility

outputs.description: Unique identifier for security events. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Processes.PID Process identifier.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Parent process identifier. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Processes.ExeFileIdx Index of target files for specific security events such as: Scanning, Malicious DLL, Malicious Macro events.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Processes.ParentID

outputs.description: Index of users. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Processes.CommandLine Command line executed with the process.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Processes.UserIdx

outputs.description: Termination action taken on the file. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Files.RawFullPath Full path for the executed file.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Processes.Terminated

outputs.description: File name. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Files.SHA256 SHA256 hash of the file.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Files.FileName

outputs.description: File size. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Users.Username Username of the active user on the endpoint.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Files.FileSize

outputs.description: Domain to which the user account belongs. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.PostDetected Was post detected.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Users.Domain

outputs.description: Termination action taken on the file. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Verdict Traps verdict for the file.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Terminate

outputs.description: Block action taken on the file. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.TargetProcessIdx The prevention target process index in the processes array.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.Blocked

outputs.description: Security module name. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.PreventionMode The prevention mode used.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.ModuleCategory

outputs.description: Traps Severity level associated with the event defined for the Traps management service. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.SourceProcess.User.Username Source username initiating the process.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.TrapsSeverity

outputs.description: Source process ID (PID). Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.SourceProcess.ParentID Parent ID for the source process.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.SourceProcess.PID

outputs.description: Source process command line. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.SourceProcess.InstanceID Traps instance ID.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.SourceProcess.CommandLine

outputs.description: Source process termination action taken on the file. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.SourceProcess.RawFullPath Source process raw full path.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.SourceProcess.Terminated

outputs.description: Source process file name. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.SourceProcess.SHA256 Source process SHA256 hash.
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.SourceProcess.FileName

outputs.description: Source process file size. Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.SourceProcess.InnerObjectSHA256 Source process inner object SHA256 hash
outputs.name: Cortex.Logging.Traps.MessageData.SourceProcess.FileSize

outputs.description: The hostname that is mapped to this endpoint. Endpoint.IPAddress The IP address of the endpoint.
outputs.name: Endpoint.Hostname

outputs.description: The domain of the endpoint. Endpoint.OSVersion OS version.
outputs.name: Endpoint.Domain

outputs.description: Endpoint OS. Endpoint.ID The unique ID within the tool retrieving the endpoint.
outputs.name: Endpoint.OS

outputs.description: The name of the host. Host.IPAddress The IP address of the host.
outputs.name: Host.Hostname

outputs.description: The domain of the host. Host.OSVersion The OS version of the host.
outputs.name: Host.Domain

outputs.description: Host OS. Host.ID The unique ID within the tool retrieving the host.
outputs.name: Host.OS

outputs.description: The PID of the process. Process.Parent Parent process objects.
outputs.name: Process.PID

outputs.description: The full command line (including arguments). Process.SHA256 The SHA256 hash of the process.
outputs.name: Process.CommandLine

outputs.description: The name of the process. Process.Path The file system path to the binary file.
outputs.name: Process.Name

outputs.description: The full file name (including file extension). File.Type The file type, as determined by libmagic (same as displayed in file entries).
outputs.name: File.Name

outputs.description: The path where the file is located. File.Size The size of the file in bytes.
outputs.name: File.Path

outputs.description: The SHA256 hash of the file. File.DigitalSignature.Publisher The publisher of the digital signature for the file.
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: The name of the company that released a binary.
outputs.name: File.Company
